zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma de Dinan於1136年出生在法國布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫迪南時，她的父親Alain de Dinan48歲，母親Eléonore de Penthièvre44歲。她於大約1155年與Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1208年12月18日在法國o-阿爾培斯洛易維特雷享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma de Dinan于1136年出生在法国布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫迪南时，她的父亲Alain de Dinan48岁，母亲Eléonore de Penthièvre44岁。她于大约1155年与Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1208年12月18日在法国o-阿爾培斯洛易維特雷享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dinan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (now mainly counties Clare and Cork): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Daghnáin ‘descendant of Daghnán’, possibly a diminutive of dagh ‘good’.
French: habitational name from Dinan, in Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany. This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Dineen
meanings: Irish (Cork and Limerick): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duinnín ‘descendant of Duinnín’, a byname from a diminutive of donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’.

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma de Dinan was born in 1136, in Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany, France, her father, Alain de Dinan, was 48 and her mother, Eléonore de Penthièvre, was 44. She married Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré about 1155. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 18 December 1208, in Vitré, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma de Dinan est née en 1136, à Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, France, son père, Alain de Dinan, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Eléonore de Penthièvre, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré environ 1155. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 décembre 1208, à Vitré, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma de Dinan 1136 in Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alain de Dinan 48 und ihre Mutter Eléonore de Penthièvre 44. Sie hat um 1155 Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Dezember 1208 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Vitré, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Dinan è nata il nel 1136 nel Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Alain de Dinan, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Eléonore de Penthièvre, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré circa 1155. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 dicembre 1208, nel Vitré, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma de Dinanが1136年にフランスブレタグンクoテス-ド'アルモーディナンで生まれた時，父Alain de Dinanは48歳，母Eléonore de Penthièvreは44歳であった。約1155年にRobert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitréと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1208年12月18日にフランスルhoネ-アルペスロイアーヴィトルeで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma de Dinan(이)가 1136년 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드'아모르 딘아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alain de Dinan(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eléonore de Penthièvre(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 대략 1155년 Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1208년 12월 18일 프랑스 ho니-알프스 로이르 비트e에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Dinan nasceu em 1136, em Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Alain de Dinan, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Eléonore de Penthièvre, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré aproximadamente 1155. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de dezembro de 1208, em Vitré, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, França, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma de Dinan родилась в 1136 г. в местности динан, кoтес-д'армор, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Alain de Dinan было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Eléonore de Penthièvre, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré около 1155 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 18 декабря 1208 г. в местности витрe, лоир, рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 72 лет.

sm.from 1152 to 1170: mai le 1152 e o'o I le 1170

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma de Dinan nació en 1136, en Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Alain de Dinan, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Eléonore de Penthièvre, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré aproximadamente 1155. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de diciembre de 1208, en Vitré, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 72 años.
